title: NH-06 BILKHAWTHLIR LEH KOLASIB INKAR KAWNG SIAM CHUNGCHANGA SP KOLASIB THUCHHUAK
content:
5049/2025-2026

Kolasib, 30th March, 2026 :Pu Lalrinpuia Varte, Superintendent of Police, Kolasib District chuan Mizoram State Sawrkar Notification No. B. 12021/10/2004-TRP dt. 01.06.2020 leh Section 115 of Motor Vehicle Act 1988 (Act No. 59 of 1988)-in thuneihna a pek angin, NH 06 Bilkhawthlir (70 Km) atanga Kolasib 95 (Km) inkar kawng NHIDCL hnuaia contractor ten kawng siam that hna chak leh zuala an thawh chhunzawm theih nan lirthei lian (Heavy Motor Vehicle) chet vel dan turah thupek a ti chhuak.

Dt. 19.03.2026 atang khan National Highway 06 Bilkhawthlir (70 Km) atanga Kolasib (95 Km) inkar chu NHIDCL hnuaia contractor ten kawngpui siam that hna an thawh mek chu hun tiam chhunga zawh hman a la nih dawn loh avangin, dt. 01.04.2026 atanga dt. 15.04.2026 chhung chak zawk a hnathawh anih theih nan a hnuai a mi ang hian lirthei lian (HMV) te tan kawng hi khar / block a ni ang:

Kawng khar hun   : 09:00 AM atanga 08:00 PM.

Kawng hawn hun : 08:00 PM atanga 09:00 AM.

Kawng danna hmun turte:

* Hmawngkhawthlir (Aizawl/Thingdawl lam atanga Kolasib khawchhung pal tlang tur tan).

* Rengtekawn (Silchar/Bairabi lam atanga Kolasib khawchhung tlan tlang tur tan).

* Rengtetlangsang (Silchar/Vairengte lam atanga Kolasib khawchhung tlan tlang tur tan).

He thuchhuah chungchanga harsatna neite chuan OC Kolasib PS (Ph.No. 9612194615) leh IC Traffic Cell, Kolasib (Ph. No. 9863500029) ah te biak theih reng an ni a. He thupek zawm lo chu 179 MV Act hmanga hrem an ni ang.

title: Lungleiah land pooling chungchanga District Level Authority an ṭhu khawm
content:
5048/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 30 :Vawiin khan Lunglei District Level Authority for Mizoram Government Land Pooling & Management Scheme chu an Chairman, District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann hovin Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah an ṭhu khawm a. Lungleia sawrkar office hrang hrang ai awhte an tel.

He ṭhut khawmah hian Lunglei khawpui chhunga Subsidiary Intelligence Bureau (SIB) Lunglei Unit Office Cum Residence (OCR) hmun tur leh District Court hmun tur atana ram mamawh dan leh hma lak zui dan tur sawi ho a ni a. SIB OCR hmun tur atan hian department hrang hrang hnenah ram awl an neih dan zawh ni se, ram awl awm dan azirin OCR sakna atan a rem leh rem loh en ho ni se, tih a ni.

Lunglei District & Sessions Judge Pi R. Lalduhawmi leh District Court hotute hnen aṭangin High Court-in District Court ram leh building mamawh dan a duan anga District Court sak len theihna tur hmun remchang an mamawh dan leh an rawtnate ngaihthlak a ni a. Lunglei District Court building luah mek leh department dang ram remchang inthleng tura rawtna awm mek chu hotu sang zawkah thlenin, a ṭul dana bawhzui ni se, tih a ni.

title: AMC-2026, General Election Inpuahchah dan thlirhona meeting MROs, AMROs leh NOs ten an nei.
content:
5047/2025-2026

Aizawl; the 30th March,2026 :Vawiin khan District Election Officer leh District Municipal Election Officer, Aizawl district ni bawk Er.Lalhriatpuia kaihhruaina hnuaia kan hma lawk April ni 21-a Aizawl Municipal Corporation ( AMC),2026 inthlanpuia Election official tur a ruat: Municipal Returning Officers(MROs), Assistant Municipal Returning Officers( AMROs) leh Nodal Officers(NOs) ten AMC,2026 General Election atana an inpuahchah dan thlirhona meeting, DC Office Pisapui Hall-ah an nei. Vawiin meeting-ah hian official tin ten an mawhphurhna zawn theuhva an hmalak tawhna leh hmachhawp awm te report an pe. Vawiin tlai dar 3:00Pm hi candidate inhnukdawh thei hun tawp niin, candidate inhnukdawk an awm loh thu leh Independent Candidate an awm lo thu report-ah hian tarlan a ni.

AMC, 2026 General Election-ah hian INC, MNF leh ZPM te chuan Ward 19-ah candidate an nei vek a, BJP erawh chuan Ward 11-ah candidate an nei thung. Candidate te hi an vaiin 68, hmeichhia- 27 leh mipa- 41 an awm. Ward 6 heng: Ward –II,IV,V,XI,XII leh XVII te hi hmeichhe tana reserved ward an ni.

Tun tum AMC,2026 General Election a hman tur Final Electoral Rolls a voter awm zat chu 239989 niin, hmeichhia – 129656  leh Mipa – 110333  voters an awm.  Mipa ai hmeichhia 19323 in an tam.  Voter  tamna ber Ward hi WARD XVIII niin, voter  18906 an awm a. A tlemna ber Ward hi WARD VIII niin; voters  7975 an awm thung.

title: CHAMPHAIAH DISTRICT LEVEL NARCO COORDINATION COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
5045/2025-2026

Dated Champhai, 30th March 2026 :Champhai District Level Narco Coordination Centre (NCORD) Committee chu vawiin chawhnu dar 3 khan Champhai DC Pu Mohammad Aaquib kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall, Keifangtlangah an ṭhukhawm.

Ṭhutkhawm kaihruaitu Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan ṭhutkhawm chhan sawiin Champhai District chhunga ruihhlo dona kawngah, sawrkar thuneitute leh tlawmngai pawl hrang hrang te inkara thawhhona tha tak a awm thin chu lawmawm a tih thu leh chhunzawm zel tul a tih thu a sawi.

Champhai SP Lokeshwaran-R, chuan meeting agenda sawifiahna neiin ruihhlo tawlh leh hman sualna a pung nasa hle a ni, a ti a. District NCORD member te chu ruihhlo dona kawngah theihtawp chhuah awmze nei zawk leh mumal zawka khuahkhirh anih theihna tura ngaihtuahna seng zel turin a chah a ni.

He huna tarlan a nih danin February leh March 2026 chhungin Champhai District Police-ten ND&PS Act, 1985 hnuaiah case 15 an ziaklut a, mi 24 man an ni a, Heroin 1.367 Kgs, Methamphetamine 38.886 kgs, Crystal Meth 10.529 kgs, ruihhlo phurh nana hman lirthei ke li nei pathum(3) leh lirthei ke pahnih nei pathum(3) an man a nih thu an tarlang.

Excise & Narcotics Department Champhai te chuan March, 2025 chhung an hmaklakna tarlangin ND&PS Act, 1985 hnuaiah case 5 ziak lutin mi 2 an man a. Heroin gram 373.530 leh Methamphetamin gram 7.900 an man a, Assam Rifles in March thla chhungin ram dang atanga dan lova cigarette lakluh case 1003 leh Methamphetamin 7.907 kgs an man bawk a ni.

Vawiin meetingah hian line department hrang hrangte hnen atangin ruihhlo dona kawng an hmalakna leh hma chhawp hrang hrangte te ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: Khawzawl District Agriculture Marketing Committee thukhawm
content:
5044/2025-2026

Dated Khawzawl, 30th March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:00 khan DCConference Hall Khawzawl-ah District Agricultural Marketing Committee (DAMC) te Handholding Scheme, 2024 hnuaia Thlai Thar market chungchangah an Chairman leh Deputy Commisioner ni bawk, Pu K. Vanlalthiana hovin an thukhawm.

Bawrhsap, Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan Khawzawl District-in thlai thar zinga a buaipui ber chu sawhthing a nih thu sawiin, Sorkar Project a ni tih hriaa theihtawp chhuah turin leh a hralhna leh thil danga harsatna a awm chuan sorkara thlen vat zel turin a hrilh a. A hralh leh buk kawngah fimkhur taka hma la turin a chah bakah Supervisor zawng zawngte chu sawhthing season chhung chu sorkar flagship programme a nih angin mahni hna aia ngaipawimawh turin a chah bawk a ni.

He meetingah hian Khawzawl District chhunga Secondary Collection Centre (SCC) hrang hrang Supervisor-te atangin Sawhthing hralh tawh dan leh stock neih dan report ngaihthlak a nih bakah Supervisor ruatbelh chung chang leh hmalak leh zel dan turte sawiho a ni bawk.

title: District Level Committee on NCORD to Organise Easter Egg Painting Competition to Promote Anti-Drug Message in Lunglei
content:
564/2025-2026

Lunglei, 30 March 2026:In a creative initiative to spread awareness against substance abuse among children and youth, an Easter Egg Painting Competition based on the Ruihhlo Do (Anti-Drug Campaign) theme will be organised for churches within the Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) area on Easter Sunday, 5th April 2026.

The programme is being organised by the District Level Committee on NCORD, Lunglei District, in collaboration with the Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan. All major Christian denominations within the LMC area are expected to participate in the event.

As part of the competition, participants will paint Easter eggs reflecting the anti-drug theme and design placards carrying meaningful slogans promoting a drug-free society. Each church will conduct the activity according to its own schedule on Easter Sunday and submit photographs of the entries along with the names of participants for evaluation.

The competition will be judged on 6th April 2026 based on the submitted photographs. Attractive prizes will be awarded to the winners, and the prize distribution ceremony will be held on 8th April 2026.

The Deputy Commissioner, Lunglei Office has appealed to all eligible participants—especially children and youth church members—to actively take part in the competition. The initiative aims not only to celebrate the spirit of Easter through creativity but also to reinforce the message of a healthy, drug-free lifestyle.

Participants are encouraged to showcase their talents and contribute towards building a stronger, safer and drug-free Lunglei.

Attachment

title: Lunglei District Level Committee on NCORD-in Lungleiah ruihhlo dona peng khat atan Easter Egg incheisiak a buatsaih dawn
content:
5043/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 30 :Naupang leh ṭhalaite zinga ruihhlo ṭhat lohzia inzirtirna peng khat atan, Lunglei District Level Committee on NCORD leh Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan hma lakna hnuaiah "Ruihhlo Do" tih thupui hmangin Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) huam chhunga kohhran hrang hrangte tan Easter Sunday, April ni 5, 2026 khian "Easter Egg Painting Competition" (Easter artui incheisiak) buatsaih a ni dawn.

He intihsiakna hi naupang leh ṭhalaite zinga ruihhlo ṭhat lohzia inzirtirna leh ruihhlo laka fihlim tura infuih tharna atana ruahman niin, kohhran hrang hrang hnenah ngenna lehkha thawn chhuah a ni a. A tel thei kohhrante chuan anmahni remchan dana ruahmanna siamin, kohhran member naupang leh ṭhalaite tan ruihhlo dona lam hawia artui incheisiak leh ruihhlo dona au hla chuanna placard insiamsiak hi an huaihawt ang a. Artui chei sa leh placard thlalakte hi a siamtu hming nen phone number: 9612876031-ah hian WhatsApp kal tlangin Easter Sunday ral hmain theh luh tur a ni ang.

Thalak theh luhte hi April ni 6, 2026-ah endik niin, lawmman ṭha tak siam a ni dawn a. April ni 8, 2026-ah lawmman sem a ni ang.

Lunglei District Bawrhsap chuan he intihsiakna hi Easter Sunday lawmna peng khat a nih bakah, Lunglei mipuite'n ruihhlo tel lova nun hlim leh hrisel an neih theih nana buatsaih a nih thu sawiin, Lunglei khawpui chhunga kohhran hrang hrang naupang leh ṭhalaite chu he intihsiaknaah hian phur taka tel turin a ngen.

Attachment

title: Tourism & Sports Minister-in Asian Development Bank hotute a kawm
content:
5042/2025-2026

New Delhi, the 30th of March, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Tourism leh Sports and Youth Services Minister chu New Delhi-ah Asian Development Bank hotute nen an inkawm a, sports leh tourism hmasawnna tura ADB aṭanga ṭanpuina awm theite an sawi a; Finance Ministry lam nen an inkawm bawk.

India rama ADB hotu lu, Country Director Pi Mio Oka hoin Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar hi an lo dawngsawng a. Tourism Minister hian Mizorama tourism lama hmasawnna thleng mek țhantir zel tur leh tourist țhahnem zawk dawngsawng thei turin state budget ringawt a tawk lo a, Externally Aided Project kal tlanga ADB aṭanga loan mamawh a nih thu a sawi.

Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan, "Kan khawpui ber Aizawl hi khualzin tana zan thum châmna daiha siam hi kan thupui pakhat a ni a, chutihlaiin thingtlang lamah eco tourism kalpui a, khawtlang nen ṭang kawpa community based tourism kalpui hi kan thupui a ni bawk, wildlife tourism kalpui turin Environment & Forest Department nen pawh thawhhona kan ziak tawh a ni," a ti.

Sports Minister ni bawk Pu Lalnghinglova chuan, "Sports hi intihhlimna satliah ni loin tunah chuan eizawnna a ni a, India sorkar pawhin a dah pawimawh tawh hle. Infrastructure piah lama infiammite tihmasawn tura man power development lama kal nat kan duh a, ADB puihna kan mamawh hle a ni," a ti bawk a; sports tourism chu state tana sum lakluhna ṭha a nih theih thu a sawi lang.

ADB hotunu Pi Mio chuan Mizoram sorkar inhawnna lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, tun hma deuha dilna an thehluh an lo hnawl tawh chu Urban Development project an neih mekte nen kaikawpa a hranpaa kalpui dan an ngaihtuah tur thu a sawi a, Finance Ministry lamah bawhzui a tum thu a sawi bawk.

Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar hian Department of Economic Affairs, Finance Ministry lama Joint Secretary (ADB changtu) Pu Baldeo Purushartha IAS pawh a kawm a, ADB lama EAP kal tlanga loan dilna awm mek a sawipui. Pu Baldeo hian ADB nen a rang lama an lo sawiho tur thu leh pek ngei a nih theihna turin hmalak a tum thu a sawi a, Mizoramin an hlawkpui tur zawnga project her rem ṭul a tih thute a sawi.

Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar hi Resident Commissioner, Mizoram House, New Delhi Pi Shweta Chauhan, IPS chuan a ṭawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: DAMLO AWMPUITUTE HAHDAMNA TUR- PATIENT ATTENDANT SHELTER CHU MLA PU JEJE LALPEKHLUA'N A HAWNG
content:
5041/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, the 30th March, 2026:South Tuipui Bialtu MLA, Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua chuan vawiin khan damdawiin a damlo awmpuitute hahdamna leh riahna hmun tur - Patient Attendant Shelter chu khuallian niin a hawng a. A hmanna tur dik taka hmang ngei turin a enkawltu turte chu chahin mi harsa zawkte chu lo duhsak thin turin a chah bawk.

Khuallian chuan damlo enkawl tura kalpui, thlenna neih that loh vanga harsatna tawk thinte chu a hriatthiampui thu sawiin chu harsatna sutkian nan Hnahthial District-ah Patient Attendant Shelter hawn a ni ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. He building awm theih nana hma latu leh thawktu zawng zawngte chungah lawmthu sawiin a nihna tur dik taka hmang a, mi harsa zawkte duhsak nachang hre thin turin a chah a ni.

Khuallian, Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua chuan Hnahthial District-ah hmasawnna tam tak a hmuh tak thu sawiin District inlungrual tak an nih avanga heng hmasawnna te hi thleng a nih thu a sawi a. Hnahthial District tan a nih chuan mahni awmna rawng te dahtha a, theihtawp chhuah thin turin thawh ho puiah kalkhawmte chu a sawm nghal a ni.

MLA chuan a ngaih pawimawh zualte sawina hun hmangin Mizoram Universal HealthCare Scheme (MUHCS) chu mipui tam zawkten hmang thei se a duh thu leh a thatna tem tawh te chu an inchhir ngai loh thu a sawi a. Hei bakah hian kawlphetha a Hnahthial a intodelh theih nan 132kV sub station nei vat turin theihtawp an chhuah mek thu a sawi bawk. Boxing hall pawh sak tan vat a nih ngei a beisei thu sawiin mipuiten fur an tuar nat loh nan SASCI sum hmangin khaw chhung hmun hrang hrangah drain siam hna kalpui mek a nih thu a tarlang nghal a ni.

Hawnna programme hi Pu Zothanmawia Khiangte, Addl DC chuan kaihruaiin Technical Report hi Er. Lalhmingthanga, JE, UD&PA hnen atanga ngaihthlak a ni a. Sawrkar officials hrang hrang bakah NGO leh Village Council hruaitute chu he programme-ah hian kalkhawmin Pu Hmingmawizuala, District Urban Development Officer chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Hnahthial District-a Patient Attendant Shelter hi Shelter For Urban Homeless Scheme hnuaiah Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation (UD&PA) Department chuan cheng nuai sawmthum pariat,sing riat leh zali sawmli (₹38,80,440) sengin an sa a. March ni 6, 2024 khan sak tan niin May ni 26, 2025 khan sak zawh a ni.

Building-ah hian floor hnih awmin Ground Floor-ah hian bedroom pahnih (2), sitting room pakhat (1), toilet pakhat(1) leh choka pakhat (1) a awm a. First floor-ah hian bedroom pakhat(1), Dormitory pakhat (1), Toilet pahnih (2) leh sitting room pakhat (1) a awm a ni.

Patient Attendant Shelter hi District Hospital bul lawkah awmin a enkawl chhunzawm hna hi Hnahthial District Hospital kutah dah a ni.

Attachment

title: State Level Monitoring Cell on LPG/POL meeting neih a ni
content:
5040/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, 30th March 2026:Vawin khan State Level Monitoring Cell on LPG/POL te chu Pi Teresy Vanlalhruaii Secretary, Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs Department hovin a office chamber-ah an thukhawm a, LPG chungchang a Mizoram dinhmun an sawi ho a ni.

Thutkhawmnaah hian tunlai Gulf region buaina avanga India ram leh khawvel hmun hrang hranga Gas leh a kaihhnawih buaina awm mekah Mizoram chhung dinhmun chu a that thu tarlan niin, mipuite an chi ai mai lohna tur leh buaina a awm loh nana sawrkar hmalakna hrang hrangte thlirho a ni a, buaina tipunlun thei thil Hoarding,diversion leh Black marketing te a awmlohna tura sawrkar hmalakna te pawh thlirho a ni bawk a ni.

Vawin meeting-ah hian department aiawh hotu pawimawh tak takte an tel a. Pawl hrang hrang aiawh: Mizo Consumer Union,Mizoram Indane Distributors Association leh RGGLV Distributors te atangin harsatna an tawhte ngaihthlak niin, hmalak zel dan turte sawi ho nghal a ni.

title: Indian Red Cross Society (Mizoram Branch) Meeting neih a ni
content:
5039/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl: the 30 March 2026 :Vawiin khan Indian Red Cross Society (Mizoram Branch) chu chairman thar, Pi K. lalrinzuali, Secretary, Health & Family Welfare hovin, SAD Conference Hall, MINECO-ah an thukhawm a. Kum kal taa IRCS (Mizoram Branch) hmalaknate an thlirho bakah, kumin atana hmalak lehna turte an rel a ni.

IRCS (Mizoram Branch) Meeting hian kumin World Red Cross Day (08 May) puala Mizorama District-te huam tura hmalak dan turte an ngaihtuahho va. A theih ang anga Branch huang zauhna tur leh mipui vantlang tana hlawk zawka kal zeldan turte an rel a ni.

Indian Red Cross Society (Mizoram Branch) hi khawvel pum huap pawl pawimawh tak a ni a.  Mizoram branch-ah hian Governor chu president niin, Sawrkar-a mi pawimawh tak takte chu pawl  kut leh ke atana ruat thin an ni a. He pawl hian kawng chi hrang hranga mipui vantlang rawngbawl  hna a thawh bakah, khawvel pum huap pawl a nih angin, khawvel hmun hrang hranga chhiatna thlen  thulhah pawl tangkai tak, chhawmdawl hna thawk thintu a ni.

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT CONVERGANCE PLAN CHUNCHANGAH THUTKHAWMNA NEIH A NI
content:
5038/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, the 30th March, 2026 :Vawiin chhun dar 12:00 PM khan DC's Conference Hall, Lawngtlaiah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga hovin Lawngtlai District- a 'Convergence Plan' thlirhona neih a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. Lawngtlai District hmasawnna tura hmalakna atan 'Convergence Plan' siam thiam a ngai hle a ni, a ti a. Convergence tha tak siam turin line department - te BDO- te inbiak rawn tam a ngai hle tih a sawi a. Rualkhai zawka hmasawnna hnathawh a nih theih nan a theih chin china ' Convergence' neih chu thil tul hmasa a nih thu a tarlang. Bawrhsap chuan department - te inrawntlang lova hnathawh hian harsatna lian zawk a siam thei tih tarlangin, department hrang hrangte inpawh taka inrawntlang fo thin turin a chah nghal bawk.

Pu H. Zonunmawia, Project Director, DRDO chuan tih theih tak tak turwh chauh 'Convergence Plan' siam a tul a ni, a ti a. Paper work- a fel, a taka fel silo ang chi chu tih loh ngam a ngai a ti. Line department - in a pawisa emaw, a hmarua emaw a mihring, a engemaw ber kan tum ve a ngai a, a vai vai in MNREGA lam kan ring thei lo a ni a ti bawk.

Thutkhawm chuan BDO ten Plan siam fel se, PD, DRDO ah a hma lamah thehluh nise a ti a. BDO Lawngtlai, BDO Chawngte, BDO Sangau leh BDO Bungtlang South ten 'Convergence Plan 2025-2026 report pe in , 2026-2027 Plan- tarlanna an nei nghal a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawm ah hian hian Addl.DC, BDO- te leh Line Department aiawhte an tel kim hle a ni.

Attachment

title: DISTRICT ROAD PROTECTION SQUAD THUTKHAWMNA NEIH A NI
content:
5037/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, the 30th March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 2:00PM khan DC's Conference Hall, Lawngtlai ah District Road Protection Squad chu Pi Margaret J.Vanlalremmawii, SDO (Sadar), Lawngtlai kaihhruaina in thutkhawmna neih a ni.

Pi Margaret J Vanlalremmawii chuan squad member kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a . District Road Protection Squad chu Lawngtlai District Road Safety Committee- in a din niin Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga kawngdunga motor duhna hmun hmun a park leh insakna bungrua kawngpui dal a dah te endik tura beisei an nih thu a tarlang a. Lawngtlai khawpui kawngdung a lo felfai zawk theih nan a theihtawp chhuah turin a chah nghal bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawm ah hian thurel hrang hrang neih niin, term & Reference siam nise, a vawikhatna atan kar leh lamah Team 2 ah inthenin khawpui chhung veng 5(panga) ah Squad drive neih nise tih a ni.

Vawiin District Road Protection Squad thutkhawm ah hian DCTO, LADC, S&WMO LADC, E.I, Transport, JE, PWD, SDO, NHSD, MJA President, Dist. VC President leh SDC te an tel a ni.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP - IN FILLING STATION LEH GAS AGENCY - TE KAWM
content:
5036/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 30th March 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan a Office Chamber-ah Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga Filling Station neitute leh Gas Agency - te a kawm.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei hmasa a. Gas leh tuialhthei chu mipuite mamawh a nih angin 'stock' tam tawk neih reng a tul hle a ni, a ti. Iran buaina avangin tuialhthei leh Gas tlakchham a awm thei tih tarlangin, mipuite mamawh ang ang pe reng thei tura inring turin Filling Station leh Gas Agency - neitute a chah a. Tun dinhmunah gas leh tuialhthei dinhmun a tha tawk chu lawmawm a tih thu tarlangin, inkhuahkhirhna erawh siam a tul hle tiin, a hma lama 'Order' chhuah a nih tur thu a sawi a ni. Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Lawngtlai mipuite mamawh ngaihtuah reng a nih thu sawiin, mipuite chiai lo tura chahin, a tul anga hmalak zel a nih tur thu a tarlang bawk.

Inkawmnaah hian Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga Filling Station leh Gas Agency - te chuan report tlangpui peiin, tun dinhmunah 'stock' a tharmt thu an tarlang a. District bawrhsap thupek ang zela kal an tum thu sawiin, order - chhuah a nih hunah an zawk tur thu an sawi a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRCIT ARM WRESTLING ASSOCIATION TEN BAWRHSAP KAWM
content:
5035/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 30th March 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai District Arm Wrestling Association-te chuan Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chu a Office Chamber-ah an kawm.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Arm Wrestling chu Mizoram piah lamah khawvela infiamna lian ber pawl a nih thu tarlangin, mi tam takin eizawn nan an hmang nasa hle a ni, a ti a. Infiamna changkang leh hming chherna tha tak a nih thu sawiin, theihtawp chhuaha khelh zel a tul thu a sawi a. Mizoram mai ni lo India ram tihmingthatu ni turin theihna an nei tih inhriaa an theihna zawng zawnga khelh chhunzawm zel turin a chah a. Mizoram State Arm Wrestling Championship 2026- a Lawngtlai District Arm Wrestling Association- te hlawhtlinna ropui a tih thu tarlangin, hmalam hunah pawh tha taka khelh chhunzawm zel tura chahin, bawrhsap a nihna angin a tul apianga tanpui a inhuam thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Lawngtlai District Arm Wrestling Association-te hian hlawhtlinna kawng hrang hrangin an lo nei tawh thin a. Tun hnaia an hlawhtlinna zingah Mizoram State Arm Wrestling Championship 2026 (25th -27th March) Aizawla neihah Gold- 4, Silver- 1, Bronze- 7, lain a pumpuiah Panga na an ni.

Attachment

title: Serchhip District Jail-ah Health Camp neih a ni
content:
5034/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 30th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District Legal Services Authority leh District Hospital, Serchhip tang kawpin District Jail, Chhiahtlang ah inmates te leh thawk tu te tan Health Camp an buatsaih.

He Health Camp hi Josangzeli Tlau, Judicial Magistrate First Class leh Secretary, District Legal Services Authority Serchhip ni bawk in a kaihruai a. Dr. ZD Lalmuanawma, District Medical Superintendent, District Hospital, Serchhip leh Pu C.Vanlaltlana, Superintendent, District Jail, Chhiahtlang in thu an sawi.

He Health Camp ah hian Specialist Doctor panga ten inmates mi 71 leh naute pakhat leh thawk tu mi 10 te tan Health Check up an nei a. Non Communicable Disease (NCD) leh TB screening neih nghal a ni a. A thlawnin damdawi an sem nghal bawk a ni.
